# Architecture Documentation

## Manual Architecture Guides

1. [overview.md](./overview.md)
2. [processes.md](./processes.md)
3. [state-machines.md](./state-machines.md)

## Auto-Generated Docs

Run:

```bash
npm run docs:all
```

Artifacts:

1. `docs/generated/api/` (TypeDoc API reference)
2. `docs/generated/dependency-graph.md` (Mermaid dependency map)
3. `docs/generated/dependency-graph.json` (machine-readable graph)
4. `docs/generated/dependency-graph.mmd` (raw Mermaid source)
